---
title: "NYPD_Complains_Cleaning"
author: "Ekansh Bharadwaj"
date: "2026-01-22"
output: pdf_document
---


```{r}
library(readr); library(janitor); library(lubridate); library(dplyr); library(stringr)

input_path <- "C:/Users/ekans/Desktop/DS340W/Datasets/NYPD_Complaint_Data_Historic_20260121.csv"

raw_df <- read_csv(input_path, show_col_types = FALSE, col_select = c("CMPLNT_FR_DT")) %>%
  clean_names()

parsed <- suppressWarnings(mdy(raw_df$cmplnt_fr_dt))

# Show the worst offenders
bad <- tibble(raw = raw_df$cmplnt_fr_dt, parsed = parsed) %>%
  mutate(year = year(parsed)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(parsed) & (year < 1990 | year > year(Sys.Date()) + 1)) %>%
  arrange(desc(year))

print(head(bad, 50))
cat("Total rows:", nrow(raw_df), "\n")
cat("Parsed non-NA:", sum(!is.na(parsed)), "\n")
cat("Out-of-range parsed:", nrow(bad), "\n")

```
```{r}
# ============================
# 01_clean_crimes.R
# R-only cleaning + processing
# CSV ONLY
# Windowed daily table (2006-01-01 to 2024-12-31)
# Fixes: insane dates caused by POSIX/ifelse coercion
# ============================

library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(janitor)
library(stringr)
library(readr)
library(tidyr)

# -----------------------------
# CONFIG
# -----------------------------
input_path <- "C:/Users/ekans/Desktop/DS340W/Datasets/NYPD_Complaint_Data_Historic_20260121.csv"
tz_nyc <- "America/New_York"

# You requested this modeling window
WINDOW_START <- as.Date("2006-01-01")
WINDOW_END   <- as.Date("2024-12-31")

# Read ONLY these columns (memory saver)
cols_needed <- c(
  "CMPLNT_NUM",
  "CMPLNT_FR_DT", "CMPLNT_FR_TM",
  "CMPLNT_TO_DT", "CMPLNT_TO_TM",
  "ADDR_PCT_CD", "RPT_DT",
  "KY_CD", "OFNS_DESC", "PD_DESC",
  "CRM_ATPT_CPTD_CD", "LAW_CAT_CD",
  "BORO_NM", "JURISDICTION_CODE", "PARKS_NM",
  "HADEVELOPT", "HOUSING_PSA",
  "X_COORD_CD", "Y_COORD_CD",
  "Latitude", "Longitude",
  "PATROL_BORO"
)

# -----------------------------
# Helpers
# -----------------------------
parse_time_hms_safe <- function(x) {
  x <- ifelse(is.na(x) | str_trim(x) == "", NA_character_, as.character(x))
  x <- str_trim(x)
  x <- ifelse(x == "24:00:00", "23:59:59", x)
  suppressWarnings(lubridate::hms(x, quiet = TRUE))
}

# -----------------------------
# Read raw (only needed columns)
# -----------------------------
raw_df <- readr::read_csv(
  input_path,
  show_col_types = FALSE,
  guess_max = 200000,
  col_select = all_of(cols_needed)
) %>%
  janitor::clean_names()

# -----------------------------
# Clean event-level table (KEEP ALL ROWS)
# IMPORTANT FIX:
#   day MUST come from cmplnt_fr_dt (Date), not from POSIX conversions.
# -----------------------------
crimes_clean <- raw_df %>%
  transmute(
    cmplnt_num        = as.character(cmplnt_num),

    cmplnt_fr_dt_raw  = as.character(cmplnt_fr_dt),
    cmplnt_fr_dt      = suppressWarnings(mdy(cmplnt_fr_dt)),
    cmplnt_fr_tm_raw  = as.character(cmplnt_fr_tm),
    cmplnt_fr_tm      = parse_time_hms_safe(cmplnt_fr_tm),

    cmplnt_to_dt_raw  = as.character(cmplnt_to_dt),
    cmplnt_to_dt      = suppressWarnings(mdy(cmplnt_to_dt)),
    cmplnt_to_tm_raw  = as.character(cmplnt_to_tm),
    cmplnt_to_tm      = parse_time_hms_safe(cmplnt_to_tm),

    addr_pct_cd       = as.character(addr_pct_cd),
    rpt_dt            = suppressWarnings(mdy(rpt_dt)),

    ky_cd             = suppressWarnings(as.integer(ky_cd)),
    ofns_desc         = str_squish(toupper(as.character(ofns_desc))),
    pd_desc           = str_squish(toupper(as.character(pd_desc))),

    crm_atpt_cptd_cd  = str_squish(toupper(as.character(crm_atpt_cptd_cd))),
    law_cat_cd        = str_squish(toupper(as.character(law_cat_cd))),

    boro_nm           = str_squish(toupper(as.character(boro_nm))),
    jurisdiction_code = as.character(jurisdiction_code),

    parks_nm          = str_squish(toupper(as.character(parks_nm))),
    hadevelopt        = str_squish(toupper(as.character(hadevelopt))),
    housing_psa       = str_squish(toupper(as.character(housing_psa))),

    x_coord_cd        = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x_coord_cd)),
    y_coord_cd        = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(y_coord_cd)),
    latitude          = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(latitude)),
    longitude         = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(longitude)),

    patrol_boro       = str_squish(toupper(as.character(patrol_boro)))
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    cmplnt_fr_dt = dplyr::if_else(
      !is.na(cmplnt_fr_dt) &
        (cmplnt_fr_dt < as.Date("1900-01-01") | cmplnt_fr_dt > Sys.Date() + 1),
      as.Date(NA),
      cmplnt_fr_dt
    ),

    day = cmplnt_fr_dt,

    occurred_dt = as.POSIXct(cmplnt_fr_dt, tz = tz_nyc) +
      dplyr::coalesce(cmplnt_fr_tm, lubridate::hours(0)),

    day_in_window = dplyr::if_else(
      !is.na(day) & day >= WINDOW_START & day <= WINDOW_END,
      day,
      as.Date(NA)
    )
  )

# -----------------------------
# Save event-level clean CSV (ALL ROWS)
# -----------------------------
out_dir <- dirname(input_path)
clean_csv <- file.path(
  out_dir,
  paste0("NYPD_Complains_", format(WINDOW_START, "%Y%m%d"), "_", format(WINDOW_END, "%Y%m%d"), "_Clean.csv")
)
readr::write_csv(crimes_clean, clean_csv, na = "")

# -----------------------------
# Daily citywide counts in the fixed window (0-fill missing dates)
# -----------------------------
daily_obs <- crimes_clean %>%
  filter(!is.na(day_in_window)) %>%
  count(day = day_in_window, name = "crime_count")

all_days <- tibble(day = seq.Date(WINDOW_START, WINDOW_END, by = "day"))

daily_full <- all_days %>%
  left_join(daily_obs, by = "day") %>%
  mutate(crime_count = replace_na(crime_count, 0L)) %>%
  arrange(day)

daily_csv <- file.path(
  out_dir,
  paste0("NYPD_Complains_", format(WINDOW_START, "%Y%m%d"), "_", format(WINDOW_END, "%Y%m%d"), "_DailyCitywide.csv")
)
readr::write_csv(daily_full, daily_csv, na = "")

# -----------------------------
# Diagnostics / summary
# -----------------------------
cat("\n=== DONE ===\n")
cat("Event-level clean CSV (all rows):\n", clean_csv, "\n", sep = "")
cat("Daily citywide 0-filled CSV (window only):\n", daily_csv, "\n", sep = "")
cat("Window: ", as.character(WINDOW_START), " to ", as.character(WINDOW_END), "\n", sep = "")
cat("Total rows: ", nrow(crimes_clean), "\n", sep = "")
cat("Rows IN window (usable for daily modeling): ", sum(!is.na(crimes_clean$day_in_window)), "\n", sep = "")
cat("Rows outside window or invalid day: ", sum(is.na(crimes_clean$day_in_window)), "\n", sep = "")

cat("\nSanity checks:\n")
cat("cmplnt_fr_dt range (parsed): ",
    as.character(min(crimes_clean$cmplnt_fr_dt, na.rm = TRUE)), " to ",
    as.character(max(crimes_clean$cmplnt_fr_dt, na.rm = TRUE)), "\n", sep = "")
cat("day range: ",
    as.character(min(crimes_clean$day, na.rm = TRUE)), " to ",
    as.character(max(crimes_clean$day, na.rm = TRUE)), "\n", sep = "")

```
```{r}
str(crimes_clean$cmplnt_fr_dt)
str(crimes_clean$day)

```
